page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8269CY processors operating at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The CPU configuration allocates exactly one thread per core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

This server type is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Additionally, there are no integrated graphics processing units on this instance. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory-to-core ratio provides a dense resource profile for memory-bound tasks, though the absence of local storage introduces a dependency on external storage resources.

The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:8 and dedicated CPU allocation, this server is configured for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and data analytics pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs operating at 3.1 GHz, featuring a one-thread-per-core allocation. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing workloads that benefit from dedicated compute resources and high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 20 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage, designed for database workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, 512 GB of RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Zero local storage requiring network-attached volumes
Configured for in-memory databases and enterprise applications
